narrative.description: Konami's tube shooter sends the player's ship spiraling around a circular playfield toward planet targets, rotating through a cylindrical enemy formation while timing shots through incoming waves.
narrative.core_loop: Rotate around the tube perimeter, destroy enemy waves spiraling inward, grab power-ups, and reach each planet stage boss.

mechanics.map_notes: Ship orbits a circular tube perimeter, rotating to face inward-spiraling enemies.
mechanics.expression: Ship orbits a circular tube perimeter, rotating to face inward-spiraling enemies.

mechanics.map_notes: Enemies arrive in Galaga-style formations that spiral toward the player.
mechanics.expression: Enemies arrive in Galaga-style formations that spiral toward the player.

mechanics.map_notes: Progress through solar system planets as discrete stage gauntlets.
mechanics.expression: Progress through solar system planets as discrete stage gauntlets.

mechanics.map_notes: Dual cannons fire immediately while rotating.
mechanics.expression: Dual cannons fire immediately while rotating.

mechanics.map_notes: Double-shot and spread power-ups temporarily upgrade firepower.
mechanics.expression: Double-shot and spread power-ups temporarily upgrade firepower.

mechanics.map_notes: Ship destroyed on enemy contact or bullet hits.
mechanics.expression: Ship destroyed on enemy contact or bullet hits.

mechanics.map_notes: Bonus ships at score thresholds extend the solar run.
mechanics.expression: Bonus ships at score thresholds extend the solar run.

mechanics.map_notes: Enemies emit radial bullet spreads during spiral dives.
mechanics.expression: Enemies emit radial bullet spreads during spiral dives.

mechanics.map_notes: Planet bosses follow repeating orbit-and-volley cycles.
mechanics.expression: Planet bosses follow repeating orbit-and-volley cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Dive-bombing enemies telegraph with a brief pause before charging.
mechanics.expression: Dive-bombing enemies telegraph with a brief pause before charging.

mechanics.map_notes: Late-planet bosses accelerate pattern speed across phases.
mechanics.expression: Late-planet bosses accelerate pattern speed across phases.

mechanics.map_notes: Tube edges constrain rotation arc during dense waves.
mechanics.expression: Tube edges constrain rotation arc during dense waves.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Gyruss through its core shooter loop.
